examples: She had a purposeful air, and it became evident that this was not a casual visit.
Whereas purposeful men could make their way across a narrow bridge, the slow diffusion of plant and animals would require an avenue as a continent and available for ages at a stretch.
The engine of the Sparviero, a purposeful tub of a fishing boat, shudders into life.
We all have a different understanding of what makes us feel purposeful and powerful.
